content: I will make a call to `multi_replace_file_content` to reduce the height/padding of the two Valuation Cards (Locked and Unlocked) even further by a small amount, and add `whitespace-nowrap` to the eKYC buttons inside `components/ValuationWizardCard.tsx` so their text remains perfectly on a single line.
thinking:

Subsequent edits will address other components within this file to finalize the desired changes. My focus is on ensuring these code alterations are seamlessly integrated, and working.
